title: bulbophyllum oblongum
intro: Bulbophyllum oblongum is a species of orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum oblongum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Bulbophyllum oblongum can be made by infusing the plant's roots and leaves in water, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
